2606.25103.title: Beyond Shapley: Efficient Computation of Asymmetric Shapley Values
2606.25103.paper_summary: We address the problem of explainability in machine learning models through feature attribution methods. In particular, we consider a variant of Shapley values known as Asymmetric Shapley Values (ASV), which enables the incorporation of causal knowledge into model-agnostic explanations through the use of a causal graph. We show that in certain contexts in which the computation of SHAP is $\#P$-hard, the exact computation of ASV can be done in polynomial time. To extend this algorithmic result, we introduce a notion of equivalence classes over the topological orderings of the underlying causal graph, which is useful to reduce the time to compute ASV. In particular, we present a polynomial-time algorithm (in the number of equivalence classes) to compute it whenever the causal graph is a rooted directed tree. Finally, we develop an algorithm for approximating ASV in arbitrary causal DAGs which relies on a procedure to sample topological orderings uniformly at random. To implement this sampling mechanism we leverage known algorithms as well as simpler alternatives. Our experimental results demonstrate the practical viability of the proposed approach in realistic causal structures.
2606.25103.paper_summary_zh: 我們通過特徵歸因方法來解決機器學習模型中的可解釋性問題。<lb/>特別地，我們考慮一種稱為非對稱夏普利值（Asymmetric Shapley Values, ASV）的夏普利值變體，這使得通過使用因果圖將因果知識納入模型無關的解釋中成為可能。<lb/>我們展示了在某些計算 SHAP 是 $\#P$-困難的上下文中，ASV 的精確計算可以在多項式時間內完成。<lb/>為了擴展這一算法結果，我們引入了一種關於基礎因果圖的拓撲排序的等價類的概念，這對於減少計算 ASV 的時間是有用的。<lb/>特別地，我們提出了一種多項式時間算法（根據等價類的數量）來計算 ASV，當因果圖是一棵有根的有向樹時。<lb/>最後，我們開發了一種在任意因果有向無循環圖（DAG）中近似 ASV 的算法，該算法依賴於一個隨機均勻抽樣拓撲排序的程序。<lb/>為了實現這一抽樣機制，我們利用了已知的算法以及更簡單的替代方案。<lb/>我們的實驗結果展示了所提出方法在現實因果結構中的實際可行性。
2606.25103.author: Ezequiel Companeetz et.al.
2606.25103.authors: Ezequiel Companeetz, Santiago Cifuentes, Sergio Abriola
